productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Printed Navy Blue Kurta
description: Composition Navy blue kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, tapering three quarter sleeves, a half buttoned placket, pin-tucks on the shoulder, flaring pin-tucks starting at the waist and embroidery on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not soak Certain fabrics will shrink mother earth's focus on providing livelihoods for rural artisans resulted in this handmade kurta that fuses earthy goodness with a modern cut and silhouette. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
